Package org.key_project.isabelletranslation.translation

Class BooleanOpHandler

java.lang.Object
org.key_project.isabelletranslation.translation.BooleanOpHandler
All Implemented Interfaces:
IsabelleHandler
public class BooleanOpHandler extends Object implements IsabelleHandler
This class handles the translation of boolean operations and Boolean formulae

  • Constructor Details

    • BooleanOpHandler

      public BooleanOpHandler()

  • Method Details

    • init

      public void init(IsabelleMasterHandler masterHandler, Services services, Properties handlerSnippets, String[] handlerOptions)
      Description copied from interface: IsabelleHandler
      Initialise this handler.

      This method is only called once after creation and before any other method is called.

      This method may also allocate additional resources that it needs for translation.

      Specified by:
      init in interface IsabelleHandler
      Parameters:
      masterHandler - the MasterHandler coordinating the other handlers (including the one at hand)
      services - the non-null services object which is relevant for this handler
      handlerSnippets - the snippets loaded for this handler, null if no snippet property file is available for this handler
      handlerOptions - arbitrary options for the handler to take into account

    • canHandle

      public boolean canHandle(Operator op)
      Description copied from interface: IsabelleHandler
      Query if this handler can translate an operator.

      Test if this handler can translate any term with the given argument top level operator.

      Specified by:
      canHandle in interface IsabelleHandler
      Parameters:
      op - a non-null operator to translate
      Returns:
      true if this handler can successfully translate all terms with op as toplevel operator

    • handle

      public StringBuilder handle(IsabelleMasterHandler trans, Term term)
      Description copied from interface: IsabelleHandler
      Translate the given term into a StringBuilder.

      This method will only be called if IsabelleHandler.canHandle(Term) returned true for the same term argument.

      The translation may add to the set of assumptions and declarations using corresponding calls to the IsabelleMasterHandler that it receives.

      Specified by:
      handle in interface IsabelleHandler
      Parameters:
      trans - the non-null master handler to which it belongs
      term - the non-null term to translate
      Returns:
      a StringBuilder containing the translation
